input: Met with Maria Alvarez, CM-204815, on Tuesday. Her daughter just started college. She wants help scheduling a morning walk routine and a follow-up call.
Referral note says Jordan Lee can be reached at 201-555-0199. His sister is the emergency contact. The team should discuss transportation help and appointment reminders.
Member MEM-77881 asked whether the clinic could text reminders. The spouse usually drives them to appointments. They need a clean plan for the next visit.
